Description: Deliver a focused white-label transition product for partner firms with branded delivery, mixed-seniority tracks, cohort operations, trust/governance, and pilot-to-paid packaging.

Summary: Define white-label PRD and execution guardrails
Description: Finalize MVP scope, non-goals, rollout constraints, and decision rights so partner requests do not create roadmap sprawl.
Document in-scope and out-of-scope scope boundaries for the MVP.
Acceptance Criteria: PRD explicitly lists in-scope and out-of-scope capabilities.
Parent: Define white-label PRD and execution guardrails

Summary: AC: Success metrics and guardrail approved
Description: Define success metrics and no-custom pilot boundary and secure cross-functional approval.
Acceptance Criteria: Success metrics and no-custom pilot boundary are approved by Product, Engineering, and Partnerships.
Parent: Define white-label PRD and execution guardrails

Summary: Implement tenant entity and hard data scoping
Description: Add tenant model and enforce tenant_id scoping across users, programs, cohorts, reports, and exports.
Dependencies: Define white-label PRD and execution guardrails

Description: Create tenant schema with branding and plan metadata fields.
Acceptance Criteria: Tenant table exists with required branding and plan metadata.
Parent: Implement tenant entity and hard data scoping

Description: Enforce tenant scoping on all core reads and writes and validate with tests.
Acceptance Criteria: Cross-tenant access tests pass and all core read/write paths enforce tenant boundaries.
Parent: Implement tenant entity and hard data scoping

Description: Enable firm logo, color theme, and branded email/digest template settings with safe defaults.
Dependencies: Implement tenant entity and hard data scoping

Description: Allow firm admins to set logo and primary brand colors.
Acceptance Criteria: Firm admin can save and update logo and primary color settings.
Parent: Build tenant branding controls

Description: Support branded preview rendering with fallback defaults.
Acceptance Criteria: Email and digest previews render with tenant branding and valid fallback defaults.
Parent: Build tenant branding controls

Summary: Ship role model and permission matrix
Description: Implement firm_admin, counselor, participant, sponsor_viewer roles with explicit permissions and audit-safe access control.
Dependencies: Implement tenant entity and hard data scoping

Summary: AC: Role assignment available to admins
Description: Provide role assignment controls for firm admins.
Acceptance Criteria: Firm admins can assign and update role membership from admin controls.
Parent: Ship role model and permission matrix

Description: Block unauthorized access and log denied requests.
Acceptance Criteria: Permission matrix is enforced on key surfaces and denied access events are logged.
Parent: Ship role model and permission matrix

Description: Add program entity and two MVP tracks: executive_transition and professional_transition with configurable templates.
Dependencies: Implement tenant entity and hard data scoping | Ship role model and permission matrix

Summary: AC: Program creation with track selection
Description: Enable program creation flow with track selection.
Acceptance Criteria: Program creation supports selecting executive_transition or professional_transition tracks.
Parent: Add program and track configuration

Summary: AC: Track templates and admin-only switching
Description: Support track templates with controlled switching.
Acceptance Criteria: Each track has separate language and milestone templates and only firm_admin can change assigned track.
Parent: Add program and track configuration

Description: Build track-aware onboarding checklists, milestone copy, and first-week goals for executive and non-executive participants.
Allow tenant-level editing of both track onboarding templates.
Acceptance Criteria: Executive and professional onboarding templates are editable at tenant level.
Parent: Create track-specific onboarding templates

Description: Capture checklist completion and verify time-to-start threshold.
Acceptance Criteria: First-week checklist completion is instrumented and onboarding can be started in under 10 minutes.
Parent: Create track-specific onboarding templates

Description: Deliver cohort view for activation, momentum, stall risk, overdue actions, and intervention queue by cohort.

Summary: AC: Cohort filters and risk ranking
Description: Provide cohort filtering and ranked risk list with rationale.
Acceptance Criteria: Firm admin and counselor can filter cohorts and view ranked at-risk participants with rationale.
Parent: Launch cohort operations dashboard

Description: Validate dashboard load and query performance at expected cohort size.
Acceptance Criteria: Dashboard meets agreed performance target under normal cohort load.
Parent: Launch cohort operations dashboard

Description: Provide one-screen what-changed view before sessions: activity delta, stalled lanes, overdue actions, and next recommended move.
Design one-screen prep flow covering change deltas and priority actions.
Acceptance Criteria: Counselor can complete pre-session prep in under 2 minutes from one screen.
Parent: Implement counselor pre-session snapshot

Description: Track counselor pre-session snapshot usage events.
Acceptance Criteria: Snapshot usage events are emitted with tenant, counselor, and participant context.
Parent: Implement counselor pre-session snapshot

Summary: Ship action-plan and weekly loop tracking
Description: Add structured action plan with due dates, reminders, completion tracking, and weekly loop completion status.
Implement due-date reminders and completion states visible to both participant and counselor.
Acceptance Criteria: Participants receive reminders and completion states are visible in counselor and participant views.
Parent: Ship action-plan and weekly loop tracking

Description: Make weekly loop completion metric available by cohort.
Acceptance Criteria: Weekly loop completion metric is queryable at participant and cohort levels.
Parent: Ship action-plan and weekly loop tracking

Summary: Add outcomes event schema and KPI dictionary
Description: Implement standardized event model and metric dictionary: activation_complete, session_prep_viewed, weekly_loop_complete, interview_stage_advance, offer_recorded.
Dependencies: Add program and track configuration | Launch cohort operations dashboard

Description: Emit canonical events with required dimensions.
Acceptance Criteria: All canonical events emit tenant, program, track, and cohort dimensions.
Parent: Add outcomes event schema and KPI dictionary

Summary: AC: KPI dictionary published and validated
Description: Publish KPI dictionary and pass data quality checks.
Acceptance Criteria: Metric dictionary is published and data QA checks pass for core event streams.
Parent: Add outcomes event schema and KPI dictionary

Description: Build weekly snapshot export with KPI trends, risk summary, interventions, and claims-context metadata.
Dependencies: Add outcomes event schema and KPI dictionary

Description: Add generated_by and generated_at metadata to exports.
Acceptance Criteria: All weekly report exports include generated_by and generated_at fields.
Parent: Generate weekly sponsor/internal report export

Summary: AC: Multi-format export with claims context
Description: Provide CSV and PDF outputs with claims context labeling.
Acceptance Criteria: CSV and PDF exports are available and include directional vs validated claims context.
Parent: Generate weekly sponsor/internal report export

Summary: Implement audit events and trust pack surfaces
Description: Log access, role changes, and report exports; publish trust artifacts and data boundary statement for partner due diligence.
Dependencies: Ship role model and permission matrix | Generate weekly sponsor/internal report export

Summary: AC: Audit events cover critical actions
Description: Capture audit events for access, role change, and export actions.
Acceptance Criteria: Audit event records are generated for critical governance actions.
Parent: Implement audit events and trust pack surfaces

Summary: AC: Trust artifacts publishable and reviewable
Description: Publish data boundary and claims policy artifacts for partner review.
Acceptance Criteria: Trust page includes role boundaries and claims policy and passes legal/procurement checklist review.
Parent: Implement audit events and trust pack surfaces

Summary: Package pricing and billing for three partner tiers
Description: Implement billing configuration and sales packaging for Solo, Boutique, and Outplacement tiers with included participants and overage rules.
Dependencies: Define white-label PRD and execution guardrails

Summary: AC: Tier rules configurable in admin
Description: Implement tier configuration for base fee, included participants, and overage policy.
Acceptance Criteria: Tier rules are configurable in admin and persist correctly per tenant.
Parent: Package pricing and billing for three partner tiers

Summary: AC: Invoice and discount logic verified
Description: Validate invoice construction and annual discount rules.
Acceptance Criteria: Invoice line items reflect base plus overage and annual prepay discount is correctly applied.
Parent: Package pricing and billing for three partner tiers

Summary: Create pilot onboarding kit and conversion playbook
Description: Deliver pilot start checklist, week-1 checkpoint, midpoint review, closeout template, and pilot-to-paid decision flow.
Dependencies: Implement audit events and trust pack surfaces | Package pricing and billing for three partner tiers

Description: Roll out standardized pilot checklist to all pilot accounts.
Acceptance Criteria: All pilot accounts use the standardized pilot checklist and week-1 checkpoint.
Parent: Create pilot onboarding kit and conversion playbook

Summary: AC: Closeout and renewal recommendation template
Description: Deliver closeout template with KPI delta and renewal recommendation fields.
Acceptance Criteria: Closeout template includes KPI deltas and explicit renewal/expansion recommendation.
Parent: Create pilot onboarding kit and conversion playbook

Summary: Run pilot validation and publish case-study package
Description: Execute pilot validation with at least three partners and compile case-study assets with approval flags.
Dependencies: Create pilot onboarding kit and conversion playbook | Generate weekly sponsor/internal report export

Summary: AC: Pilot count and conversion threshold achieved
Description: Validate minimum pilot volume and pilot-to-paid conversion performance.
Acceptance Criteria: At least three pilots are launched and pilot-to-paid conversion is at least 40 percent.
Parent: Run pilot validation and publish case-study package

Description: Capture approval for partner proof assets.
Acceptance Criteria: At least two case studies are approved with named or permissioned proof blocks.
Parent: Run pilot validation and publish case-study package
